title: Bloomsbury Mill - Muslin Cloths for Baby - Soft 100% Organic Cotton Muslin Squares - Baby Muslins Pack of 6 - Large Burp Cloths - Baby Essentials For Newborn - Blue & White - 70x70cm
features: KIND TO BABY'S SKIN: Crafted from beautifully soft, pure organic cotton, this set of 6 sensory muslin squares are perfect for your little one. They're perfect for using as a makeshift bib, a burping cloth or helping sooth baby to sleep as calming comforter.Featuring stars, polka dots and chevron designs in blue and white hues, these absorbent muslins are so gentle next to baby's delicate skin., they make a great baby shower gift as each pack is neatly finished in a card gift box with a satin ribbon loop.

ORGANIC BABY MUSLIN SQUARES: All of our super-soft, breathable baby burp cloths for newborn are crafted from beautifully woven certified 100% GOTS organic cotton. Softer than a bamboo muslin, it also ensures that these organic muslins cloths for baby are natural, kind to sensitive skin and sustainably grown. These baby boy muslin cloths are also designed with practicality in mind as they're easy to wash, quick drying, can be tumble dried on a low heat, kind to sensitive skin and become softer after each wash.

NEWBORN BABY ESSENTIALS: Bloomsbury Mill are award winning manufacturers of nursery items that help to create more moments of everyday fun. Like the rest of our range, these large muslin cloths for baby swaddle do not compromise on inspiration, imagination, quality and design. By selecting Bloomsbury Mill, you can be assured that every product meets our high safety standards and passion for fun.

ENVIROMENTALLY KIND: Every muslin cloth we sell has been produced to meet the highest industry and quality standards (Oeko-tex and ISO) so you can be confident these baby muslin cloths are ethical, honest and sustainable.

MUSLIN BABY BLANKET SIZING: 70 x 70 cm Each muslin burp cloth comes in a card gift box making it the ideal new parent gift. These newborn essentials are available in a range of soft shades of white, pink, grey & blue.
